name: caveman-mode
description: Keep replies in caveman mode with ultra default, plus normal and off switching.

interface.shortDescription: Makes replies shorter and more direct.
interface.longDescription: Adds one style-switch skill that defaults to ultra caveman replies and can switch to normal caveman or off.
defaultPrompt: Use caveman-mode:mode for shorter replies in this chat.
Use caveman-mode:mode with normal caveman mode.
Use caveman-mode:mode and reply normally again.
